category_sources: source_facts.description identifies lnk as git-native dotfiles management.
docs_sources: source_facts.homepage and source_facts.repo point to the official GitHub repository; README is the primary official documentation surface.
repo_sources: source_facts.repo already has a value, so repo is returned as null per instructions.
tags_sources: source_facts.description says git-native dotfiles management; source_facts.executables lists the lnk CLI.
